transcript.text: It's been a long three days.
Well, should be a quick one today.
So you got the access of that category, right?
Because your engineering team has Webflow access to our CMS.
So you can directly publish the approved articles under that category which I created.
I'll double check, but we should have access.
Aida was able to add additional assignments based off the feedback we got ContentOS.
Then we shared the first blog for review and calibration.
Just want to make sure that it's pulling in company context and everything correctly.
Then we've got one other blog in production that we should be able to share later this week.
For the thought leadership stuff, I had drafted the first post that we had in the series from the strategy doc.
And then John shared this Airbyte viewpoint post.
And so the flow didn't really make sense with how it was structured.

So I wanted to see if there are any additional articles being worked on that we should be aware of, just to kind of make sure we have full context into what these Yeah, I think the idea was that John has started writing the first two or three posts for this blueprint, what we call it, like an agent blueprint.
And so that was because he wanted to kickstart before the growthx engagement, like it started.
We need to send you the first three posts so that then you can just say, hey, okay, this is what we're talking about.
And then from there, there won't be any more content necessarily written from us in that sense.
Yeah, that would be super helpful just because I was reading through it and I was like, this post doesn't make sense to come as number two now, even as number three didn't make sense.
So, yeah, there is a bit of like just like handoff friction in between, okay, you found there, you wanted to start like the day, you said, look, I'm writing this.
And then I'm like, okay, let's now scale it.
And so, again, like it's just a bit of that friction in between the us starting and like then kicking off the engagement.
But like, yeah, like we can send you like everything we have today so that you can feed that data and so on and so forth.
So, yeah, think Mario and I are going to finalize all that today.
So you should have it by end of day.
I think Kushal might just be helpful if you want to take a look at this one, just for overall kind of tone and structure.
Again, it's in draft format, so I'm really looking to be the calibration piece for this.
And then larger question, I think, for the series format.

We had put together the kind of strategy doc as like a series that builds over time, but I think it may make more sense to do like standalone pieces that tackle different topics rather than try to consistently build on the previous week's content.
But I wanted to get your guys' thoughts.
Let me run this by – Jean couldn't make it, but let me run this by him today, and yeah, we can get back to you on this.
I think it makes more sense for like a standalone like pieces that tackle different topics.
And one of the things that I wanted to do with the –
Founders was like, hey, what do you think the first 15 topics should be?
that like, instead of us having to generate this, because they know what they want, like, they know better what they want to talk about.
So they can then remove that decision fatigue and say like, these are going to be the first 15 pieces.
then from there, we can figure out like, how to keep going in that sense.
Because then we can just schedule like, quick interviews to like, pull their ideas out.
And then we can structure the content and then have that for review and edits.
Yeah, I think that makes more sense.
Just having them set the topics, and then we can work on how do we flesh them out.
And then lastly, for next week, I did want to try to schedule a deep dive really to better understand the platform.
I know we were going to do that when I was meeting with Michelle the first time, but we really didn't get too much into the product.
So I think trying to figure out.

So just for our team to have more context into what the platform is, how it works, also will help us kind of poke at different PSEO plays based off what we know from functionality and features, and then try to get some understanding on when the launch for the MCP is going to happen.
Yeah, we can get that done.
I added it as a to-do list.
Let me see, like, who we need to involve there.
Which engineers we need to involve.
Those are the updates we have for today.
We're also going through a bit of a reorg on our side, so context is flying everywhere.
But any other topics or things you guys wanted to discuss or top priorities?
Yeah, so for me, in this sense, it's like, okay, we have the, we-
Half of them I have reviewed, 50% are not relevant, which I have mentioned, others I'll check, but I think we need to do a bit of keywords and topic research around those.
Can we, Erik, can you go into the content OS really quickly?
So could you go, all right, okay, so in the right one, so there are four that are in backlog that were explicitly rejected.
The ones in considering, what did you think about those?
Yeah, I think John has mentioned some comments, so still I have not reviewed all.
So whenever John has mentioned comments, he's just,
You have to change those titles, but those are like, you have to just modify, those are not rejected.
Yeah, the others one, I'll check today.
So then you can let me know, because I did go in and I uploaded additional ones.
So the ones that were explicitly rejected are in backlog, then John left some suggestions on the titles.
I updated the titles, so we should be good to go.
So I think you can let me know what you think about the rest of the titles, and then I'll go in and we can refine the list further.
All right, yeah, we have another.
So yeah, feel free to tag me in the Google Doc with any questions or comments, and then we'll send you another blog by the end of the week.
So to do this for us, is everything clear, Tanmay and Kushal?
So we'll provide a lot of, again, short week for us too, but we'll provide a lot of more feedback today so that we can keep moving.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress and align on strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Thought Leadership Pivot:** Shifting from a sequential series to standalone articles to enable more flexible publishing. Airbyte will provide 3 existing posts by EOD today to resolve a handoff issue.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [**Founder-Led Topics:** Airbyte founders will provide the next 15 thought leadership topics, removing decision fatigue and ensuring content alignment with their vision.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
  - [**Content OS Review:** Tanmay will review the updated Content OS list today, which now incorporates feedback from John (Airbyte) to refine titles and remove irrelevant topics.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Platform Deep Dive:** A product deep dive will be scheduled for next week to give GrowthX team members the context needed for effective PSEO strategy and to get an MCP launch timeline.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)

## Topics

### Thought Leadership Strategy Pivot

  - [**Problem:** A handoff friction point was identified. Airbyte's John had already written 3 posts for the "agent blueprint" series before the GrowthX engagement began.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [**Impact:** This made the planned sequential flow illogical, as a recent "Airbyte viewpoint" post didn't fit the original structure.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [**Solution:** Airbyte will provide the 3 existing posts by EOD today to give GrowthX full context and resolve the handoff.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [**New Direction:** The team will pivot to standalone articles on distinct topics instead of a sequential series.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This allows for more flexible publishing and better aligns with the goal of interviewing founders for their ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [**Founder-Led Topics:** Airbyte founders will provide the next 15 topics, ensuring content aligns with their vision and removing decision fatigue.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)

### Content OS & Blog Production

  - [**Content OS Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [**Rejected:** 4 topics are now in the "backlog" tab.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [**Revised:** Titles for other topics were updated based on feedback from John (Airbyte).](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
      - [**Action:** Tanmay will review the full list today to finalize topic selection.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Blog Production:**](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
      - [**Review:** The first blog draft was shared for calibration on tone and company context.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
      - [**In Production:** A second blog is in progress, with a draft expected by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Publishing:** GrowthX has direct Webflow access to publish approved articles.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)

### Platform Deep Dive

  - [**Need:** A product deep dive is required to provide the GrowthX team with the context needed for effective strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [**Objectives:**](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
      - [Understand the Airbyte platform's functionality and features.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
      - [Inform PSEO strategy based on product knowledge.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
      - [Get a timeline for the Minimum Composable Product (MCP) launch.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [**Action:** Mario will schedule the deep dive and identify the necessary engineering participants.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Airbyte (Mario/Kushal):**](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
      - [Share the 3 existing thought leadership posts with GrowthX by EOD today.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
      - [Schedule the product deep dive for next week.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [**Airbyte (Tanmay):**](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Review the updated Content OS list and provide final feedback to Aida today.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**GrowthX (Erik):**](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
      - [Get founder approval to pivot to standalone thought leadership articles.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [**GrowthX (Aida):**](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - [Share the second blog draft by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/KxfkvvPvWkn9aZyw1TLKYtTwyrEove22?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)

action_items.description: Verify Webflow CMS access for new category; confirm to Tanmay
Send first 3 thought-leadership posts to Erik/Aida; then Erik/Aida review draft for tone/structure
Send first 3 thought-leadership posts to Erik/Aida; then Erik/Aida review draft for tone/structure
Confirm thought-leadership series format w/ Jean; update Erik/Aida
Schedule next-week platform deep dive w/ GrowthX; include relevant engineers
Review remaining ContentOS titles; tag Aida in Google Doc w/ feedback
